info.name: Recruitment API
info.description:
Recruitment API collection for managing candidates, vacancies, and ranking.

Base URL: `http://localhost:3000`

Swagger UI: `http://localhost:3000/api/docs`

## Modules
- **Candidates** — CRUD for candidate profiles
- **Vacancies** — CRUD for job openings with weighted criteria
- **Ranking** — Score and rank candidates against a vacancy

request.description:
Create a new candidate.

**Request Body:**
| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| name | string | Yes | Full name |
| email | string | Yes | Must be unique |
| dateOfBirth | string | Yes | ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) |
| gender | string | Yes | `male` or `female` |
| currentSalary | number | Yes | Must be ≥ 0 |

**Responses:**
- `201 Created` — Candidate created successfully
- `409 Conflict` — Email already registered
- `400 Bad Request` — Validation error

Retrieve all candidates ordered by creation date (newest first). Supports pagination.

**Query Parameters:**
| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|---------|-------------|
| page | integer | 1 | Page number |
| limit | integer | 10 | Items per page |

**Responses:**
- `200 OK` — Array of candidate objects

Retrieve a single candidate by UUID.

**Path Parameters:**
| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| id | UUID | Candidate ID |

**Responses:**
- `200 OK` — Candidate object
- `404 Not Found` — Candidate not found

Update a candidate. All fields are optional — only provided fields are updated.

**Path Parameters:**
| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| id | UUID | Candidate ID |

**Request Body** (all fields optional):
| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| name | string | Full name |
| email | string | Must be unique |
| dateOfBirth | string | ISO 8601 date |
| gender | string | `male` or `female` |
| currentSalary | number | Must be ≥ 0 |

**Responses:**
- `200 OK` — Updated candidate
- `404 Not Found` — Candidate not found
- `409 Conflict` — Email already taken

Delete a candidate by UUID.

**Path Parameters:**
| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| id | UUID | Candidate ID |

**Responses:**
- `204 No Content` — Deleted successfully
- `404 Not Found` — Candidate not found

item.name: Vacancies
item.description: Manage job vacancies and their weighted criteria

request.description:
Create a new vacancy with weighted criteria.

**Request Body:**
| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| name | string | Yes | Vacancy title |
| criteria | array | No | List of evaluation criteria |

**Criteria Object:**
| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| type | string | Yes | `age`, `gender`, or `salary` |
| weightScore | integer | No | Score awarded when matched (default: 1, min: 1) |
| minAge | integer | When type=age | Minimum candidate age |
| maxAge | integer | When type=age | Maximum candidate age |
| gender | string | When type=gender | `male`, `female`, or `any` |
| minSalary | number | When type=salary | Minimum candidate salary |
| maxSalary | number | When type=salary | Maximum candidate salary |

**Responses:**
- `201 Created` — Vacancy created
- `400 Bad Request` — Validation error

request.description:
Retrieve all vacancies with their criteria, ordered by creation date (newest first). Supports pagination.

**Query Parameters:**
| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|---------|-------------|
| page | integer | 1 | Page number |
| limit | integer | 10 | Items per page |

**Responses:**
- `200 OK` — Array of vacancy objects with criteria

Retrieve a single vacancy with its criteria by UUID.

**Path Parameters:**
| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| id | UUID | Vacancy ID |

**Responses:**
- `200 OK` — Vacancy with criteria
- `404 Not Found` — Vacancy not found

request.description:
Update a vacancy. All fields are optional. If `criteria` is provided, all existing criteria are **replaced** entirely.

**Path Parameters:**
| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| id | UUID | Vacancy ID |

**Request Body** (all fields optional):
| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| name | string | Vacancy title |
| criteria | array | Replaces ALL existing criteria |

**Responses:**
- `200 OK` — Updated vacancy
- `404 Not Found` — Vacancy not found

request.description:
Delete a vacancy and all its associated criteria (cascade delete).

**Path Parameters:**
| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| id | UUID | Vacancy ID |

**Responses:**
- `204 No Content` — Deleted successfully
- `404 Not Found` — Vacancy not found

item.name: Ranking
item.description:
Rank candidates against a vacancy using weighted criteria scoring.

**Scoring Algorithm:**
1. Each candidate is evaluated against all vacancy criteria
2. If a criterion is satisfied, its `weightScore` is added to the candidate's total score
3. Candidates are sorted by score (descending); ties are broken alphabetically by name
4. Results are cached in Redis for 300 seconds (configurable via `REDIS_TTL`)

**Criteria Evaluation:**
- **Age** — Candidate's current age must be within [minAge, maxAge]
- **Gender** — Candidate's gender must match (or criteria is `any`)
- **Salary** — Candidate's currentSalary must be within [minSalary, maxSalary]

request.description:
Rank all candidates for a specific vacancy using weighted criteria matching.

Results are cached in Redis. To force a fresh calculation, call **Delete Ranking Cache** first.

**Path Parameters:**
| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| vacancyId | UUID | Vacancy to rank candidates against |

**Responses:**
- `200 OK` — Ranked list of candidates with scores
- `404 Not Found` — Vacancy not found

Invalidate the Redis ranking cache for a specific vacancy. Use this after updating candidates or vacancy criteria to force a fresh ranking calculation on the next GET request.

**Path Parameters:**
| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| vacancyId | UUID | Vacancy whose cache to invalidate |

**Responses:**
- `200 OK` — Cache cleared
